name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious ZipExec Execution
notes:
This Building Block detects the use of ZipExec which is a Proof-of-Concept (POC) tool to wrap binary-based tools into a password-protected zip file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious ZipExec Execution
SIGMA Description: ZipExec is a Proof-of-Concept (POC) tool to wrap binary-based tools into a password-protected zip file.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious ZipExec Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/generic:microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename=%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.zip%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/pass:%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/user:%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/delete%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename=%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.zip%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious ZipExec Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/generic:microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename=%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.zip%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/pass:%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/user:%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/delete%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename=%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.zip%')) AQL filter query
